rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Dec Novr 1814 ad eundem diem revolution - 1815
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description and type as it accurately matches the image. claude-haiku misread the text significantly.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and type. claude-haiku misidentified as an entry and had a minor description difference.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and type. claude-haiku misidentified as an entry and had a minor description difference.

Overrode both for description, reading 'Glyncar Rectory 2½ P.T.D' from the image. Selected gpt-5-mini for the amount (135.0.0), which is clearly visible. claude-haiku misread the amount columns entirely.
Overrode both for description, reading 'Menhenniot 2 qrs' from the image. Selected gpt-5-mini for the amount (136.0.0), which is clearly visible. claude-haiku misread the amount completely.
This row was visually identified in the image and missed by both extractors. It is a description line without an associated monetary amount.

Overrode gpt-5-mini for description, reading 'Bansett' from the image. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the amount of 10 shillings, though it misread the description as 'Akte Ten'. claude-haiku missed this row.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and type. claude-haiku misread the description and type.
Selected gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku completely missed this entry, merging it into another description.
Selected gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku completely missed this entry.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate type and description. claude-haiku misidentified as an entry and incorrectly made 'Variable' plural.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku merged the description with the next line and misread the pounds amount.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount, including the 0.5 fraction (4½d). claude-haiku misread the description entirely but got the amount correct.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku misread the description and the pence amount (4 instead of 11).
Overrode both for description, visually reading 'Clifton Ferry'. Both extractors correctly extracted the amount 9.11.0. gpt-5-mini read 'Upton Ferry', claude-haiku read 'Boatlinghan'.

Overrode both for description, visually reading 'Bensington'. Selected claude-haiku for the correct interpretation of the amount '8.-1' as 8 pounds, 0 shillings, 1 pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read it as 8 pounds, 1 shilling, 0 pence.
Overrode both for description, visually reading 'Trethewin'. Both extractors correctly extracted the amount 44.2.0. gpt-5-mini read 'Frothwin', claude-haiku misread entirely.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and type. claude-haiku missed this header, incorporating it into a previous description.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku misread the description and pence amount.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku misread the description, pounds, and shillings.
Overrode gpt-5-mini for description, reading 'Attens Do' from the image instead of 'Atkins Do'. Selected gpt-5-mini for the accurate amount. claude-haiku misread description and shillings.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku misread description, pounds, and shillings.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku had a minor description difference but correct amount.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount, including the 0.5 fraction (1½d). claude-haiku misread description, pounds, and pence.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and type. claude-haiku misread the description.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku misread description and shillings.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount, correctly interpreting '6.-' as 6 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence. claude-haiku misread description and omitted shillings/pence values.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku misread the description but got the amount correct.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and amount. claude-haiku missed this entry (having already misattributed 'Medenham' to a prior row).

Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description, type, and amount. gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified the arithmetic discrepancy visible in the ledger. claude-haiku misidentified this line as the 'Recepta Anni presentes' header and extracted incorrect amounts.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and type. claude-haiku misidentified this header as a total line with incorrect values.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description and type. claude-haiku merged the description with part of the following entry.

Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description. Overrode amounts based on visual verification, reading '19.3.8'. gpt-5-mini misread pounds as 9; claude-haiku misread shillings as 2 and used a generic description.
Overrode gpt-5-mini description for exact match 'Do' (gpt-5-mini had 'Do Do'). Both extractors accurately extracted the amount 19.3.8.

Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description, type, and amount. gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified the arithmetic discrepancy visible in the ledger. claude-haiku used a generic description 'Total'.
